messages.text:
BL-511 — Daily briefing: estimate the Telegram front-desk bridge's cost per day (exact per-call figure, front-desk + Operator Telegram share)
What it solves: WHAT / WHY: the human wants a daily, honest figure for "how much extra am I paying for the
Telegram front-desk bridge." Today that number is uncomputable from the outside AND is
literally thrown away: each front-desk/Operator `claude -p --output-format json` invocation
reports its own exact total_c…
Approval context: Draining your Telegram question (INTAKE-operator-question-1784315781560.md) into a daily-briefing cost line. You already confirmed the three big calls: EXACT per-call cost (capture the total_cost_usd each front-desk/Operator `claude -p` already computes and we currently delete), scope = front-desk …
BL-511 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-511" (or "reject BL-511 <reason>") to act.
